description_long: This modern bungalow features a boxy, two-story design with a flat roof and clean, horizontal siding in a light color. The front facade includes a large balcony with glass railings, supported by columns, and a patio area beneath, both adorned with potted plants and outdoor furniture. Large sliding glass doors and multiple rectangular windows provide ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The landscaping includes neatly trimmed grass patches and several medium-sized trees, with a paved driveway and walkway leading to the entrance. The rear of the bungalow has a raised deck and additional windows, while the sides are more minimal, with fewer openings and some decorative plants. The overall structure is spacious, with a focus on outdoor living and modern architectural lines.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a balcony, and landscaped front and rear yards.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, balcony with glass railings, patio area, and landscaped yard with trees and flowers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the balcony, side windows, and two trees on the lawn, with minimal wall openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a raised deck, large sliding glass doors, and a simple, clean facade with fewer windows.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring a small window, a row of flowers, and a side lawn with a single tree.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and rear windows, minimal side windows
